hooks.command: for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/guard.py"; done; exit 127
for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/inject_protocol.py"; done; exit 127
